issue.message: WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE no longer provides write access when targeting Android 10, unless you use `requestLegacyExternalStorage`
Field requires API level 26 (current min is 23): `android.provider.Settings#ACTION_APP_NOTIFICATION_SETTINGS`
Field requires API level 26 (current min is 23): `android.provider.Settings#EXTRA_APP_PACKAGE`
Field requires API level 24 (current min is 23): `android.telephony.SubscriptionManager#INVALID_SUBSCRIPTION_ID`
Call requires API level 24 (current min is 23): `android.telephony.TelephonyManager#createForSubscriptionId`
Call requires API level 24 (current min is 23): `android.telephony.SubscriptionManager#getDefaultSmsSubscriptionId`
Expecting `android:required="false"` for this hardware feature that may not be supported by all Android TVs
The application should not provide its own launch screen
Requiring Wifi permissions limits app availability on TVs that support only Ethernet

Did you mean `android.permission.WRITE_OBB`?
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.

This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Very long vector path (905 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Nested weights are bad for performance
